goal: Hero principal del homepage de rentatelo.com — generar FOMO de viaje familiar en Florida. El carro es el habilitador invisible; el payoff emocional es la familia parada en Pier 60 mirando el Golfo de México al sunset.

creative_direction.core_idea: El carro los trajo aquí — Clearwater Beach Pier 60 al sunset, familia mirando al Golfo
creative_direction.visual_thesis: La primera imagen que ven debe generar FOMO de viaje — el carro no es el producto, es el portal a este momento

composition.layout: family cluster center-right, SUV parked background left-center, left third entirely open sky and ocean for headline overlay

camera.framing: left third fully reserved — open sky transitioning to dark ocean edge, zero subjects in that zone
camera.angle: eye-level, slight low angle to amplify horizon scale and sky presence
camera.lens_style: 24–35mm equivalent, natural perspective, zero barrel distortion
camera.depth_of_field: deep focus — family sharp, SUV slightly soft but clearly identifiable, horizon crisp

overlay_compatibility.zone_content: open sky transitioning to dark ocean edge
overlay_compatibility.brightness_target: zone luminance below 40% to guarantee white text legibility

subject.ethnicity: Latin American — Colombian, Venezuelan, or Mexican appearance
subject.pose: backs fully to camera, standing at Pier 60 railing, looking toward Gulf of Mexico horizon
subject.clothing: casual summer vacation — shorts, t-shirts, sundress, sandals — no brand logos visible
subject.position_in_frame: center-right cluster at pier railing, lower third anchor

secondary_subject.type: white Nissan Rogue or Toyota RAV4 SUV
secondary_subject.position: background left-center, parked in Pier 60 parking area approximately 20 meters behind family
secondary_subject.visibility: clearly identifiable silhouette — not dominant, supporting visual evidence the family drove here

scene.location: Clearwater Beach, Pier 60, Pinellas County, Florida — Gulf of Mexico waterfront
scene.time_of_day: golden hour / sunset — sun at or just below Gulf horizon
environment: wooden pier structure and observation deck extending over Gulf of Mexico
Pier 60 railing at foreground lower third
open beach parking area behind pier entrance
Gulf of Mexico turquoise water with horizontal golden reflections
wide Florida sky with rich orange and amber cloud formations
scene.background_view: Gulf of Mexico open horizon — turquoise water catching golden-orange sunset light, rich amber sky with soft layered clouds, no urban structures or buildings visible
critical_scene_rules: family must have backs completely to camera — faces NEVER visible
SUV must be parked and clearly visible in background, not cropped out of frame
left third must contain only open sky and ocean — no people, no car in that zone
golden hour light must feel warm and cinematic — no flat, cold, or overcast quality
no rental company signage, logos, or text anywhere in scene
pier must be recognizable as Clearwater Beach Pier 60 — not a generic dock
water color must read as Gulf turquoise — not Atlantic blue-green

lighting.primary: golden hour natural backlight — sun at or below Gulf horizon
lighting.quality: warm, cinematic, rich amber-orange cast over full scene
lighting.family_lighting: rim-lit silhouettes with warm glow — faces not needed, silhouettes are intentional
lighting.suv_lighting: soft golden ambient, metallic sheen visible
lighting.sky_treatment: rich orange-amber gradient with soft layered clouds catching last light
lighting.water_treatment: turquoise base with horizontal golden reflections on surface

dominant: amber-orange sky in the F0B576 tonal range
accent: deep teal 168F8A in water shadows at horizon
rules: sky must be warm orange-amber — zero cool or grey tones
water must read as turquoise Gulf — not dark, grey, or Atlantic blue-green
family silhouettes trending dark against backlight is correct and intentional
overall image warmth: high — this is the dream payoff moment
left overlay zone must be dark or medium-dark — avoid blown-out highlights in that area

negative_prompt: faces visible on any family member
tourist crowds or other people visible on pier
rental car logos or commercial signage
text or watermarks anywhere in scene
Atlantic coast water — must be Gulf of Mexico
car in foreground or visually dominant over family
stock photo aesthetic or artificial smiles
SUV absent — car must be present and identifiable
cool blue or grey sky tones
urban buildings or city skyline visible
master_prompt: Hero image for rentatelo.com homepage — the emotional payoff of renting a car for a Florida family vacation. A LATAM family of four — parents mid-30s to mid-40s, two children ages 5 to 12 — stand at the edge of Pier 60 in Clearwater Beach, Pinellas County, Florida, backs completely to the camera, looking out at the Gulf of Mexico horizon. They are relaxed and close together, wearing casual summer clothes — shorts, t-shirts, light sundress, sandals — no brand logos. A white Nissan Rogue or Toyota RAV4 SUV is parked clearly visible in the pier parking area 20 meters behind the family, slightly left of center in the frame — the silent proof that the car brought them here. Wide establishing shot, eye-level with slight low angle, 24–35mm natural perspective, deep focus. The left third of the frame contains only open sky transitioning to dark ocean edge — this zone must remain dark enough for white headline text overlay, no subjects in this zone. Golden hour lighting with the sun at or just below the Gulf horizon — rich amber and orange sky with soft cloud layers, turquoise Gulf water catching horizontal golden reflections. Family appears rim-lit in warm backlight, silhouettes are welcome and intentional. Color palette: amber-orange sky in the F0B576 tonal range, Gulf turquoise water with teal 168F8A shadows at depth, white SUV with warm metallic sheen. Overall warmth high — cinematic travel editorial quality. Avoid: visible family faces, stock photo stiffness, rental signage, Atlantic blue-green water, cold or grey tones, aerial perspective, urban skyline, crowds, car in foreground.
